subject: [PATCH v3 05/11] mm: swap in PMD swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of swap entries during swapoff by introducing a new function, `swap_pmd_cache_lookup`, which classifies the swap cache behind a PMD swap entry as empty, backed by one PMD-sized folio, or requiring per-page handling. The patch also introduces a new function, `unuse_pmd`, which swaps in PMD-level swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff. If a PMD-order folio cannot be allocated, the PMD swap entry is split into PTE-level entries via `__split_huge_pmd`. This change aims to optimize swapoff performance by reducing the number of page-table lookups required.
